report.summary: Day 71 standup v9: PUBLISH_QUEUE EMPTY — all 485 pages now in PUBLISHED_PAGES (milestone). Since v8: 5 agents ran (build, community, design, eod, publish). Build-7 shipped 2 new guides (Tax-Loss Harvesting + Cold Storage Security, ~5,100 combined words). Design-v8 created 2 OG images + fixed Cold Storage mobile grids and OG metadata. Publish-v4 promoted Polymarket + Scroll (queue drained to 0). Community-v7 drafted 4 social posts (CLARITY Act thread, BTC $71K rally, content drop, Solana stablecoin dominance) + newsletter v17 + 2 SVG cards. EOD-v8 confirmed 46 TS errors (unchanged), 746 uncommitted files. BTC $71,043 (+3.79% relief rally). F&G 33 (Fear, recovering). Git locks Day 8 — deploy gap now 170+ pages (485 declared vs ~315 deployed). 43 total agent runs today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v8: 5 agents ran (build, community, design, eod, publish). 43 total runs today (standup×9, build×7, design×8, community×7, publish×4, eod×8). 8th full rotation nearly complete.

MILESTONE: PUBLISH_QUEUE IS EMPTY. All 485 pages now in PUBLISHED_PAGES. Zero pages remaining in queue. This is the first time the queue has been fully drained — site coverage is at maximum capacity pending new content creation.

BUILD CYCLE 7 OUTPUT (post-v8): 2 new learn guides — Crypto Tax-Loss Harvesting Guide 2026 (~2,500 words, covers IRS wash sale exemption, TLH strategy walkthrough, short vs long-term optimization, tax software comparison, 1099-DA reporting, 6 FAQs) + Cold Storage & Seed Phrase Security Guide 2026 (~2,600 words, covers hardware wallet comparisons Ledger/Trezor/Coldcard/Passport/Keystone, seed phrase backup, multi-sig, BIP39 passphrase, 6 FAQs). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE with full Article+FAQ JSON-LD schemas.

DESIGN CYCLE 8 OUTPUT: 2 OG images created (Tax-Loss Harvesting: dark theme with gains/loss chart + Form 8949 icon; Cold Storage: dark theme with shield + hardware wallet outline + seed phrase grid). Cold Storage page: 4 fixes applied — 3 mobile grid layouts fixed (multi-sig, hot/cold comparison, related links all now use auto-fit minmax for proper stacking), OpenGraph images array + Twitter card metadata added, canonical URL added.

COMMUNITY CYCLE 7 OUTPUT: 4 social posts drafted — CLARITY Act bipartisan breakthrough thread (4 parts, Wed 10AM), BTC $71K relief rally outlook (Tue 7PM), new guides content drop (Thu 12PM), Solana stablecoin dominance thread (3 parts, Fri 10AM). Newsletter v17 for Thu Mar 27 ('BTC Reclaimed $71K While Everyone Was Scared'). 2 SVG social cards (CLARITY Act Deal + BTC Relief Rally). Discord/TG evening update drafted.

PUBLISH CYCLE 4 OUTPUT: Promoted Polymarket + Scroll guides from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue now empty at 485 total. All page QA passed (metadata, JSON-LD, breadcrumbs, H1, OpenGraph). Build OOM on full Next.js build (VM memory constraint on 800+ page site) — individual page QA clean.

EOD CYCLE 8 OUTPUT: 20 learn guides promoted today across 9 batches. TS errors unchanged at 46 (3 files). 746 uncommitted files (+6 from v7). 467 unique slugs confirmed, 364 with page.tsx (78%). No new regressions.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC $71,043 (+3.79% relief rally). ETH +5.16%. F&G 33 (Fear — recovering from extreme low of 10 on Mar 22). Stablecoins $312B+ ATH. Solana stablecoin supply $15.7B ATH, 36% global tx volume, $650B monthly. CLARITY Act bipartisan deal (Tillis-Alsobrooks): passive yield banned, activity rewards allowed. Senate markup targeting late April. 5 days to March close — monthly gain ~2%, 7-month red streak still at stake.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v8: build-7 (2 guides + SEO), design-v8 (2 OG images + mobile fixes), community-v7 (4 posts + newsletter + 2 SVGs), publish-v4 (2 pages promoted, queue drained), eod-v8 (QA audit). 5 agents ran = $452 human-equivalent.
MILESTONE REACHED: PUBLISH_QUEUE is EMPTY. 485 pages in PUBLISHED_PAGES. All queued content has been promoted. Future cycles need to focus on creating new content to refill the pipeline.
TOTAL PUBLISHED SLUGS: 485 in PUBLISHED_PAGES config. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Deploy gap now 170+ pages (35% of declared content invisible to Google).

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) present since Mar 16. 746 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally but never committed.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: TS errors at 46 across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage unescaped >, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 2/8 API routes. Core data routes unprotected.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: ~103 orphan slugs without page.tsx.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×9, build×7, design×8, community×7, publish×4, eod×8 = 43 runs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY 170-PAGE BACKLOG: Deploy gap is now 170+ pages (485 declared vs ~315 live). Queue is fully drained — every piece of content we've built is ready but invisible. One git unlock + push deploys a 54% content increase. BTC relief rally to $71K + CLARITY Act deal + F&G recovery = peak search demand. Every hour of delay is compounding SEO loss.

PRIORITY 2 — REFILL THE PIPELINE: PUBLISH_QUEUE is empty for the first time. Next build cycles should prioritize high-value new content: (1) CLARITY Act Stablecoin Yield Analysis page (Senate markup imminent, zero competition on 'stablecoin yield rules'), (2) Solana Stablecoin Dominance page ($650B monthly tx, PayPal PYUSD narrative), (3) /trading hub page (fixes persistent 404), (4) Missing /compare/exchanges page.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON RELIEF RALLY NARRATIVE: BTC reclaimed $71K with 3.79% rally while F&G still at 33. ETH outperforming at +5.16%. Stablecoin supply ATH at $312B. Community has 4 posts + newsletter ready to fire. March close in 5 days — if BTC holds, 7-month red streak breaks. This is a high-engagement window.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Day 71 — 43 agent runs producing $3,527 human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost. The empty queue is a success signal: the content machine has outpaced the publish pipeline. Now the constraint has shifted from 'promote faster' to 'create more + deploy what exists.' The CLARITY Act yield compromise + Solana stablecoin dominance are the two most underreported stories in crypto right now — both map directly to existing degen0x guides that need to be live.
